case_title: DEVANNA, MICHAEL vs. ARMSTRONG, LEE ANNE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVANNA, MICHAEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEVANNA, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMSTRONG, LEE ANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 529-A PAGE ST, A.K.A. 529 1/2 PAGE ST, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE. [CRC 522] INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. [CCP 415.46]
